classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'IB-002 — Investigator Brochure' with subtitle 'BRC-471 (Lumitanib) — Edition 2'. Contains drug safety profile, pharmacology (DDI data), updated clinical data from Phase I/II trials, and adverse event summaries—all characteristic components of an Investigator Brochure.

summary: This is Edition 2 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an investigational oncology drug sponsored by Biorce Therapeutics S.L. The document provides updated Phase II interim efficacy and safety data, a new ILD/pneumonitis safety signal, confirmed CYP3A4 drug-drug interaction data with itraconazole, and revised benefit-risk assessment, superseding Edition 1 from December 2022.
